_meta.final-six-selection: Orchestrator-recommended subset (Goals 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8) — covers all 4 AP-7 seed goals + investing + shared experience fund. Balanced across time horizons.

goals.label: Vacation Fund
goals.description: Save a dedicated amount for a shared trip or experience — so travel becomes a planned joy, not a guilt purchase.

goals.label: Emergency Buffer
goals.description: Build 3–6 months of essential living expenses in a joint account so an unexpected cost doesn't derail the whole plan.

goals.label: Home Down Payment
goals.description: Save toward a down payment on a home — or grow the equity already there with fewer competing priorities draining the account.

goals.label: Debt Freedom Date
goals.description: Pick a target date to be fully free of non-mortgage debt — and build a payoff plan that makes that date real.

goals.label: Start (or Grow) Investing
goals.description: Open or increase contributions to a retirement or investment account — putting money to work in the background while life happens in the foreground.

goals.label: Build a Shared Experience Fund
goals.description: Create a dedicated account for things you both want to do together — concerts, weekend trips, hobbies, date nights — so those experiences don't compete with bills.
